jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
